meta.title: Turginbay Bekzat | Cinematic Full-Stack Portfolio
meta.description: A premium dark portfolio for Turginbay Bekzat, an ambitious IT student from Kazakhstan building toward an elite full-stack future.
meta.ogDescription: Premium developer identity, cinematic dark interface, and serious product ambition from a future full-stack builder.

hero.title: Designing sharp interfaces. Building serious systems.
hero.body: I build modern digital experiences with precision, ambition, and long-range intent. The goal is bigger than a student portfolio: create products that already feel composed, scalable, and ready for real users.
hero.statusValue: Studying at Satbayev University while building real products with web and mobile direction.
hero.statusNote: The target is clear: elite full-stack capability, clean product taste, and disciplined execution over time.
hero.signatureBody: A restrained motion field that makes the hero feel alive, technical, and intentional before any case study is opened.

about.title: Early in the journey. Already operating with higher standards.
about.lead: Turginbay Bekzat is a young IT student from Kazakhstan building toward full-stack depth with seriousness, discipline, and a strong eye for modern product quality.
about.introBody: He is not trying to look experienced before the work exists. He is building the habits, taste, and technical range that let real products feel clean, useful, and scalable.
about.philosophyBody: The mission is not to collect random tools. It is to develop product judgment, engineering depth, and the ability to ship complete digital systems end to end.
about.quote: I’m building the skillset of a developer who can create products people trust, enjoy, and remember.

identity.label: Education
identity.note: 2nd year IT track with serious growth intent.

identity.label: Direction
identity.note: Full-stack systems, product UI, and disciplined iteration.

skills.title: A stack shaped around real product building.
skills.lead: The technologies are practical, but the standard is premium: clean interfaces, stronger backend logic, mobile exploration, and a disciplined toolchain.
skills.labTitle: How the stack is being sharpened
skills.labBody: Every tool here is tied to shipping better products, not simply expanding a checklist.

groups.label: 01 / Frontend
groups.title: Clean interfaces with structure
groups.description: Modern layouts, responsive execution, and interface clarity that feels deliberate.

groups.label: 02 / Backend
groups.title: Logic that can scale
groups.description: Backend thinking built around Python, Django, and cleaner product architecture.

groups.label: 03 / Mobile
groups.title: Product direction beyond the browser
groups.description: Flutter and Firebase used to explore real-time flows, mobile UX, and role-based systems.

groups.label: 04 / Tools
groups.title: A reliable build routine
groups.description: Tooling that supports consistency, version control, and focused development cycles.

projectsSection.title: Three builds that already show product ambition.
projectsSection.lead: Each project is presented like a mini case study: clear purpose, sharper structure, and enough substance to show real direction.

journey.title: A roadmap aimed at elite full-stack capability.
journey.lead: The path is deliberate: strengthen the fundamentals, build real products, connect interface quality to system logic, and keep raising the standard.
journey.closingBody: The end goal is clear: build polished digital products with engineering depth, design taste, and founder-level ownership.

phases.title: Strengthen the core
phases.body: Solidify programming fundamentals, frontend execution, and backend reasoning through consistent practice.

phases.title: Ship real projects
phases.body: Turn learning into case studies, interfaces, product logic, and stronger engineering habits.

phases.title: Scale full-stack confidence
phases.body: Connect backend systems, APIs, and frontends into products that feel mature and cohesive.

phases.title: Operate at elite level
phases.body: Reach a standard where product quality, technical depth, and execution discipline feel inseparable.

contact.title: Open to serious builders, future collaborators, and sharp conversations.
contact.lead: The public identity is still growing, but the contact layer is already structured like the work: clean, intentional, and ready to scale.
contact.footnote: More public links can be connected as the profile stack expands.

cards.label: GitHub
cards.title: Repository signal
cards.body: Code, project structure, and the public trail of what is being built.

cards.label: LinkedIn
cards.title: Professional profile
cards.body: Reserved for a sharper network-facing identity and future collaborations.

cards.label: Instagram
cards.title: Personal layer
cards.body: A softer brand channel prepared without breaking the premium technical tone.

cards.label: Email
cards.title: Direct channel
cards.body: Prepared as the most direct route for real opportunities and serious outreach.

footer.closing: Built in Kazakhstan. Aiming at global-level product quality.
